chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3598 - وَ قَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ اَلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِنَّ مِنْ سَعَادَةِ اَلْمَرْءِ أَنْ يَكُونَ مَتْجَرُهُ فِي بِلاَدِهِ وَ يَكُونَ خُلَطَاؤُهُ صَالِحِينَ وَ يَكُونَ لَهُ أَوْلاَدٌ يَسْتَعِينُ بِهِمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3598 - Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain (as) said:
"Part of a man's happiness is that his business is in his own land, that his associates are righteous, and that he has children who assist him."
